creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 222422
sysutils.iichid.patch

- Make FreeBSD hidraw driver interoperable with hid-tools.
- Use loader tunable to turn HID-over-USB support on/off instead of choosing it at build time.
- Allow build on non-ACPI platforms with I2C option disabled. USB support should be operable on them.
